hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_response.filePath // .tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; case "$f" in */BUILD|*/BUILD.bazel|*/WORKSPACE|*/WORKSPACE.bazel|*.bzl) buildifier "$f" ;; esac; } 2>/dev/null || true
jq -r '.tool_response.filePath // .tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; case "$f" in *.go) gofmt -w "$f" ;; esac; } 2>/dev/null || true
